modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't print after updating macOS to the latest version.

full_description_text:  
I can't print to any of my printers.  
Ever since I updated my Mac to the latest OS, nothing works.  
It's super frustrating because I need to print stuff!
short_description: Can't print after updating macOS to the latest version.
description:
I can't print to any of my printers.

It's super frustrating because I need to print stuff!
